## 📚 Documentation Issue

**What type of documentation issue is this?**
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Unclear or confusing content
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Broken links or formatting
- [ ] Code examples not working
- [ ] Typos or grammar issues

## 📍 Location

**Where is the documentation issue located?**

### File/Page
- **File**: [e.g., docs/DEVELOPMENT.md, README.md, API docs]
- **Section**: [e.g., "Installation", "API Reference", line number]
- **URL**: [if applicable]

### Context
**Quote the problematic text or describe the missing content:**
```
Paste the problematic text here or describe what's missing
```

## ❌ Current Problem

**Describe what's wrong with the current documentation:**

### Specific Issues
- [ ] Information is missing
- [ ] Information is incorrect
- [ ] Information is outdated
- [ ] Examples don't work
- [ ] Instructions are unclear
- [ ] Links are broken
- [ ] Formatting is broken
- [ ] Grammar/spelling errors

### Impact
**How does this affect users?**
- [ ] Prevents successful setup/installation
- [ ] Causes confusion during development
- [ ] Leads to incorrect usage
- [ ] Wastes development time
- [ ] Creates poor first impression

## ✅ Suggested Improvement

**How should this be fixed?**

### Proposed Changes
**Describe the changes you'd like to see:**
```
Provide suggested text, outline, or description of improvements
```

### Additional Content Needed
- [ ] Code examples
- [ ] Screenshots or diagrams
- [ ] Step-by-step instructions
- [ ] API reference details
- [ ] Configuration examples
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide
- [ ] Best practices
- [ ] Performance considerations

## 📊 Priority

**How important is this documentation issue?**
- [ ] **Critical**: Blocks new users from getting started
- [ ] **High**: Causes significant confusion or errors
- [ ] **Medium**: Improves clarity and user experience
- [ ] **Low**: Minor improvement or cosmetic issue

## 🎯 Audience

**Who is affected by this documentation issue?**
- [ ] New users/developers
- [ ] Experienced developers
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] API consumers
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] End users

## 📋 Documentation Type

**What type of documentation needs improvement?**
- [ ] **Setup/Installation**: Getting started guides
- [ ] **Development**: Development environment and workflow
- [ ] **API Reference**: Endpoint documentation
- [ ] **Architecture**: System design and components
- [ ] **User Guide**: Feature usage and tutorials
- [ ] **Contributing**: Contribution guidelines
- [ ] **Deployment**: Installation and configuration
- [ ] **Troubleshooting**: Common issues and solutions

```
Paste any error messages here
```

### Expected vs Actual
**What you expected vs what actually happened:**
- **Expected**: Following the docs should result in...
- **Actual**: Instead, I got...

## 🛠️ Willing to Contribute?

**Would you like to help fix this documentation issue?**
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR with the fix
- [ ] Yes, but I need guidance on how to contribute
- [ ] No, but I'm available to review proposed changes
- [ ] No, I'm just reporting the issue

## ✅ Checklist

**Before submitting this documentation issue:**

- [ ] I have checked the [latest documentation](https://github.com/Kaushator/Htx_project_attemp_101/tree/copilot-refactor/docs) on the `copilot-refactor` branch
- [ ] I have searched [existing issues](https://github.com/Kaushator/Htx_project_attemp_101/issues) to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have provided specific location information
- [ ] I have described the problem clearly
- [ ] I have suggested improvements where possible
- [ ] I have indicated my willingness to contribute
